tasks.title: Telegram MCP — 2-way bot pairing
tasks.notes: FIXED 2026-05-10 (evening). Root cause: .env had CRLF line endings that broke the token regex in server.ts. Fixed by rewriting with LF-only endings. Server now starts and loads token correctly. Remaining: (1) Restart Claude Code — MCP server needs to reload; (2) DM the bot on Telegram → get 6-char pairing code; (3) Run /telegram:access pair <code>; (4) /telegram:access policy allowlist to lock down. Bot token in ~/.claude/channels/telegram/.env.

tasks.title: BuildAR Pro — pre-build research (AR libs, Expo vs RN, schema delta)
tasks.notes: COMPLETED 2026-05-10. Full report at owner_inbox/research/buildar_prebuild_research.md. Key findings: (1) AR lib: ViroReact — only option with AR+non-AR fallback as first-class APIs, iOS+Android, Expo config plugin, active (v2.54.0 April 2026); (2) Expo path: managed prebuild (expo prebuild + config plugin) not bare — ViroReact doesn't run in Expo Go but works cleanly with prebuild, eject cost later is low; (3) PNPM: use node-linker=hoisted for mobile workspace + Expo metro monorepo config; (4) Schema: existing schema is guides/image_targets — completely different from new plan. Start fresh, carry forward Silas's RLS patterns + auto-profile trigger.

tasks.title: WhatsApp MCP — 2-way reliable messaging
tasks.notes: PAUSED 2026-05-05 by Inon. All WhatsApp software stopped: bridge killed, watchdog scheduled task deleted, no auto-start. Current Go bridge is fundamentally fragile (port conflicts, SQLite stuck transactions, manual restarts required). Open questions when resuming: (1) How does Inon send messages TO Andy? (2) Windows Service for auto-restart; (3) 2-way comms needs a dedicated number — Green API recommended; (4) Remote control / dispatch trigger from WhatsApp. Resume when Inon is ready — recommend Green API (commercial REST, no local bridge, true 2-way) as the clean solution.
